name: Blueberry Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound can blueberries (in heavy syrup), well drained
1 pound can crushed pineapple, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water.
2. Add reserved juices (about 1 1/2 cups) and drained fruit to the Jell-O mixture.
3. Pour the mixture into a 9x13-inch pan and chill until firm.
4. For the topping, beat together cream cheese and sugar.
5. Add sour cream and vanilla; mix well.
6. Spread the topping over the chilled gelatin mixture.
7. Chill.
